column21: My heart aches for you following the loss of your dear brother. He meant so much to you, and I pray you can feel the love and light that surrounds you even in this present time. I wanted to send these flowers as a small expression of my care and remembrance. May you find comfort in God’s presence and in cherished memories. As Psalm 34:18 reminds us, ‘The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.’ I’m holding close in my prayers and my heart. With love, Saba.
